stonetop.summary: The drowned bride who roams moonlit woods, dragging others into her endless search.

system.concept: The drowned bride who roams moonlit woods, dragging others into her endless search.
system.description: Those who ply the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6kt1b8ozEREDCi4k]{Great Wood} tell an old tale of a bride, newly married to a handsome trapper. He failed to come home one night, and she unwisely entered the forest to find him, falling into a deep pond and drowning. Ever since, her ghost has roamed the woods on moonlit nights: wet and shivering, desperate and pleading, certain that her husband is still out there.
